rawAssistant: Don't waste good time lookin' for nests when the ground's still damp and the mist's liftin'. We got us a bigger problem on our hands - them stones, they're restless. Been stirrin' up trouble all night, like angry spirits. If you want to know what's causin' the commotion, I reckon we should take a gander at that road over yonder.
